THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, CLIFTON DARN, GARDENIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH STREET #307, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL DEC-03-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFTS DO NOT VACATE BY 5PM ON 12-3-96, PLTF ENTITLED TO AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR BACK RENT OF $246.25, DMGS OF $6.25 PER DAY FROM 10-15-96 THRU 12-3-96, PLUS $83 COSTS. GENERAL RELEASE & WAIVER OF CLAIMS. SEC DEPOSIT FORFEITED. ANY PERSN PROPTY DEEMED ABANDONED. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS/FEES.
